name: dodopayments
description: Dodo Payments tools for Claude Code, including integration agent skills and the Dodo Payments API and docs MCP servers.

dodo_api_key.title: Dodo Payments API Key
dodo_api_key.description: Optional. Only required if you switch the API MCP server in .mcp.json to local stdio mode (dodopayments-mcp). The default remote SSE server authenticates via OAuth in your browser.

dodo_webhook_key.title: Dodo Payments Webhook Key
dodo_webhook_key.description: Optional. Only required for local stdio MCP mode. Obtain from Dashboard > Developer > Webhooks.

dodo_environment.title: Environment
dodo_environment.description: Either test_mode or live_mode. Only used by the local stdio MCP server.
